message:
feat(search-core): refine two-tier search and add planner module

Two-Tier Search Refinements:
- auto_init.rs: Improve initialization error handling
- fastembed.rs: Add additional model configuration
- model2vec.rs: Fix type annotation
- two_tier.rs: Adjust score blending parameters and improve
  documentation for the two-tier search architecture

New Planner Module (share/planner.rs):
- Add planning utilities for search query optimization
- Support for query decomposition and strategy selection
- Integrates with two-tier search for adaptive query handling

These changes improve the robustness and flexibility of the
semantic search infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
